title: LoopCycleCheckpoint
description: Single-loop checkpoint written after each major step. Enables resume from interruption without re-executing completed steps.

generated_at_utc.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when this checkpoint was written.

cycle_id.description: Cycle identifier (ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of cycle start, or --cycle-id arg).

completed_steps.description: Ordered list of major steps that completed successfully.

last_completed_step.description: Name of the last successfully completed step, or null if none completed.

exec_memory_cycle_ready.description: Whether exec memory promotion succeeded before checkpoint was written.

partial.description: True while the loop is in progress; false after loop_summary written (terminal).
